trends.name: PDRN Cream (Skincare Regenerative)
trends.viral_hook: Korean skincare regenerative ingredient — PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) promotes collagen production and skin healing. Before/after transformation videos showing anti-aging results. ExplodingTopics growth: +5900%.
trends.notes: Sustained at 40.5K for fifth consecutive week. PDRN solidifying as retinol replacement. $30-60 price point.

trends.name: PDRN Toner (Anti-Aging Skincare)
trends.viral_hook: PDRN-infused toner for anti-aging — smooths fine lines, softens dryness, revives tired skin. Companion product to PDRN cream. Layered skincare routine videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Volume steady at 2.4K. Riding the PDRN wave. $15-30 price point stacks with PDRN cream.

trends.name: Podcast Microphone (USB Condenser)
trends.viral_hook: Affordable USB podcast microphone for content creators — setup tutorials and 'upgrade your audio quality' videos. Creator economy driving demand. Summer podcast launch season.
trends.notes: Highest volume at 60.5K — sustained for weeks. Summer podcast launch season. $50-150 price point.

trends.name: Plant Chocolate Protein Powder
trends.viral_hook: Vegan chocolate protein powder — smoothie and protein shake recipe content. 'Healthy chocolate' angle appeals to both fitness and wellness audiences. Plant-based + chocolate = guilt-free indulgence.
trends.notes: Growth decelerated from +2400% to +1100% WoW — may be levelling off. Still early summer = peak fitness season. Subscription model potential.

trends.name: Cat Toothpaste (Pet Dental Care)
trends.viral_hook: Specialised cat toothpaste in poultry/malt flavors — pet owners show their cats tolerating (or loving) toothbrushing. 'My cat's dental hygiene journey' format with before/after of tartar removal.
trends.notes: Growth decelerated from +900% to +413% WoW — normalisation after surge. Still strong volume at 14.8K. Low competition, recurring monthly purchase.

trends.name: GLP-1 Supplement (Natural Weight Loss)
trends.viral_hook: Natural alternative to Ozempic/Wegovy — GLP-1 supplements for appetite control and glucose metabolism. 'Natural Ozempic' trend driving massive search volume. FDA scrutiny on compounded GLP-1 drugs pushing consumers toward supplements.
trends.notes: Holding at 49.5K — stable high-volume trend. Summer weight loss season arriving. $40-80/month recurring purchase.

trends.name: Mini LED Projector
trends.viral_hook: Turn your bedroom wall into a movie theatre — compact, affordable, perfect for small spaces. Summer outdoor movie season now at peak. Room transformation and setup videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Late May = peak outdoor movie season. $50-150 price point = good commissions

trends.name: Neck Fan (Portable Wearable)
trends.viral_hook: Hands-free personal fan — summer essential for commuting, outdoor work, and events. Dual-blade design with neckband form factor. 'What's in my bag' and 'summer essentials' content driving discovery.
trends.notes: Seasonal peak — late May timing perfect for summer content. $15-40 price point high volume.

trends.name: Posture Corrector Device
trends.viral_hook: Before/after transformations showing posture improvement for remote workers. 'Worn for 30 days — what changed' format continues to perform. WFH permanence driving sustained demand.
trends.engagement_estimate: 3.1M+ views, strong comment engagement across TikTok
trends.notes: Evergreen performer. Broad demographic — office workers, gamers, elderly. $20-40 price point.

trends.name: Pet Hair Remover (ChomChom-style)
trends.viral_hook: Satisfying before/after of pet hair removal from furniture. 'Look how much hair this removed' reveal format drives insane share rates. Spring shedding season = peak demand.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1M+ views, high share rate across pet communities
trends.notes: Spring shedding season running through June. Reusable design appeals to eco-conscious buyers. $15-25.

trends.name: LED Strip Lights (Smart RGBIC)
trends.viral_hook: Room transformation videos — gaming setups, bedroom aesthetics, music-synced lighting displays. 'TikTok made me buy it' category leader. Consistent viral format year-round.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1.5M+ views, consistent high volume across TikTok
trends.notes: Year-round evergreen. Low price ($10-30) but broad appeal and high volume. Best for traffic-driving.

source_summary: Scanned via CloakBrowser (stealth Chromium) 2026-05-25: ExplodingTopics.com delivered 6 trending products (PDRN Cream +5900%, PDRN Toner +5600%, Podcast Microphone +1100%, Plant Chocolate Protein +1100%, GLP-1 Supplement +925%, Cat Toothpaste +413%). Growth rates have normalised slightly WoW — Plant Chocolate Protein dropped from +2400% to +1100%, Cat Toothpaste from +900% to +413%. All core trends stable. Combined with 5 established evergreen products (Mini LED Projector, Neck Fan, Posture Corrector, Pet Hair Remover, LED Strip Lights). Summer seasonal products (neck fan, mini projector) at peak momentum.
